title: verbesina parviflora var. parviflora
intro: Verbesina parviflora var. parviflora, also known as Smallflower Crownbeard, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States, characterized by its small yellow flowers and taproot system. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, containing sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Verbesina parviflora var. parviflora include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
